title: Force-meld
content:
{{Top|canon=Song of the Force}} {{ForcePower |image=[[File:FlyingBlind-EGF.jpg]] |name=Force-meld |alternate=*Battle meld[[Outbound Flight (novel)|''Outbound Flight'']] *[[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] meld[[Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force (real-life book)|''Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force'']] *Combat meld''[[Dark Nest III: The Swarm War]]'' |alignment=[[Light side of the Force/Legends|Light side of the Force]] |area= |purpose= |inventor= |affiliation=Jedi }} {{Quote|Tell me, Master Skywalker, has Master Kenobi ever spoken to you of the Jedi meld?''"
"''I don't think so. What does it do?''"
"''It permits a group of Jedi to connect their minds so closely as to act as a single person.|Jorus C'baoth and Anakin Skywalker|}} '''Force-meld''', otherwise known as '''Jedi meld''', sarcastically as the '''United Jedi Cluster-Mind''', or '''battle meld''', was a rare [[Force power/Legends|technique]] where a [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] joined others in their minds together, drawing strength from each other. A refinement of [[Battle meditation/Legends|battle meditation]], it was known to the ancient [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]], though dangerous. While battle meditation could influence a user of the [[The Force/Legends|Force]] and the insensitives of both sides, Force Meld concentrated on coordinating and improving the Force-sensitives of the user's side. ==Overview== {{Quote|I don't suppose the United Jedi Cluster-Mind has any suggestions about how to handle this one?|[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]|''[[The New Jedi Order: Destiny's Way]]''}} Because the number of Force-sensitives participating in a full scale battle was usually much smaller than the insensitives, in a way the demand of Force Meld was smaller than that of battle meditation as the meld influenced a smaller number of sentient minds. As a result, Force Meld was believed to be relatively easier to master, as the number of meld practitioners in the [[New Jedi Order]] was almost half of all the known battle meditation practitioners in the old order. In ancient days, the Legions of Lettow were defeated on Columus in large part since they were too individualistic to countenance using this power, while the Jedi under Grandmaster Awdrysta Pina joined their actions with this power.''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare|The Essential Guide To Warfare]]'' [[Jorus C'baoth]] performed it at least eight times in his life. [[Anakin Solo]] redeveloped it for the [[New Jedi Order]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], which allowed the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] fighting the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] to act as a single, powerful entity. Under the coordination of [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]], Force Meld played an important role during the [[Mission to Myrkr]], boosting the efficiency of the [[Myrkr strike team]]. Later, inspired by [[Joruus C'baoth]]'s legendary power during the [[Thrawn campaign]], [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]] further fine tuned Force Meld as a starfighter squadron tactic used in her [[Twin Suns Squadron]]. Shortly afterward, [[Madurrin]] applied the meld as an inter-squadron coordinating tactic, with Jacen and [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] soon taking up such a post as well. Prolonged use of this technique will cause the users to start finishing each other's sentences or thoughts. This power can also be seen as a form of telepathy. [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] warned that Force Meld took a Master of great power and depth in the Force to create a single entity state without killing or destroying the minds of everyone involved. The drawback of Force Meld was one of the elements which led to the [[Dark Nest Crisis]]. The enhanced power brought by Force Meld worked both ways: while the entity could influence a large number of minds with much more power, a great [[Wound in the Force/Legends|disturbance in the Force]] could overwhelm the melding participants as they received the pain through their enhanced senses. If the pain was caused by the minds the melding participants were touching, it would bring devastating effects to the participants, sometimes to such a degree that the participants would lose control of their own minds and become ignorant to other threats. The majority of [[Light side of the Force/Legends|light side]] meld participants could prevent a single participant from slipping to the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]]. However, if the meld participants were divided in thoughts and could not focus to a common objective, the meld would become a liability rather than an asset. ==Behind the scenes== During a statement to reporters, U.S. President Barack Obama unintentionally referred to the Force meld when he made mention of a "Jedi mind meld."{{WebCite|url=http://www.washingtonpost.com/blogs/in-the-loop/post/obamas-jedi-mind-meld-mixes-sci-fi-worlds/2013/03/01/749ca984-8291-11e2-a350-49866afab584_blog.html|text=Obama's 'Jedi mind meld' mixes sci-fi worlds|date=2013-03-01|archivedate=20220524171335}} Some fans were angered by his merger of terms from both the Star Wars and Star Trek universes, while others, including [[Lynne Hale]],{{WebCite|url=http://politicalticker.blogs.cnn.com/2013/03/04/jedimindmeld-the-force-for-obama-is-strong-here|text=#jedimindmeld: The force for Obama is strong here|author=Ashley Killough & Gregory Wallace|date=2013-03-03|archivedate=20130305005454}} pointed to this article on [[Wookieepedia]] depicting the existence of a Jedi meld.{{WebCite|url=http://techcrunch.com/2013/03/01/ease-the-geek-rage-obamas-technically-right-there-is-a-jedi-meld|text=Ease the Geek Rage: Obama's Technically Right. There is a Jedi Meld|date=2013-03-01|archivedate=20220925020136}}{{WebCite|url=http://civic.mit.edu/blog/petey/sorry-nerds-but-obama-was-right-about-the-jedi-meld-and-metaphysics|text=Sorry, Nerds, But Obama Was Right About The Jedi Meld And Metaphysics|date=2013-03-01|archivedate=20130815203225}} An alternate name of the Force meld is "Jedi meld," as mentioned in [[Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force (real-life book)|''Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force'']]. ==Appearances== {{ScrollBox|content= *[[Outbound Flight (novel)|''Outbound Flight'']] {{Ab|Outbound Flight
